basic_details.job_title: DDK Hyderabad Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Resource Person, Video Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Resource Person, Video Assistant and More
basic_details.short_information: Doordarshan Kendra Hyderabad (DDK Hyderabad) Casual Assignee Notification 2026 has been released on 2 April 2026 on the official website Prasar Bharati (prasarbharati.gov.in). Have been announced through the DDK Hyderabad Casual Assignee Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation Professional Degree/Diploma in Video Editing. Professional Degree/ Diploma in Videography.
qualification.details: Resource Person: Essential: (i) Class -XII + 3 year Experience in TV/ Doordarshan programme production and Co-ordination. Or (ii) Graduation with professional Diploma in TV Programme Production / Mass Communication / Journalism. Or (iii) Graduation with Professional Degree /Diploma in a specific Field. Post Production Assistant (Video Editing): Essential: Professional Degree/Diploma in Video Editing. Desirable: Two years Experience in TV/ Doordarshan /Video Programme Production. Video Assistant: Essential: Professional Degree/ Diploma in Videography. Desirable: Two years Experience of TV/Digital/Video Programme.

selection_process: Scrutiny of Applications Shortlisting Skill Test/Written Test/Personality Test (depending upon the category)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DDK Hyderabad Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DDK Hyderabad Casual Assignee posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Casual Assignee posts at Doordarshan Kendra Hyderabad is 29th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Casual Assignee posts at DDK Hyderabad?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies available for Casual Assignee posts at Doordarshan Kendra Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Casual Assignee posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Casual Assignee posts is a minimum of 21 years and a maximum of 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for these positions ranges from Rs.3000/- to Rs.5000/- per assignment.

faq.question: Q6. What are the different posts available under the Casual Assignee recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Resource Person, Post Production Assistant (Video Editing), and Video Assistant.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates, as well as for General/OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the educational qualification required for the Resource Person post?
faq.answer: For the Resource Person post, essential qualifications include Class XII with 3 years of experience or Graduation with a professional diploma in TV Programme Production/Mass Communication/Journalism, or Graduation with a professional degree/diploma in a specific field.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, shortlisting, and a skill test/written test/personality test, depending on the category.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will direct you to the relevant pages.
